device_name: RT Elements  (4.5); (Elements) Multiple Brain Mets SRS; (Elements) Cranial SRS; (Elements) Spine SRS; (Elements) Cranial SRS w/ Cones; (Elements) RT Planning Platform; (Elements) Dose Review; (Elements) Retreatment Review; Elements Segmentation [Cranial , Basal Ganglia, Head & Neck, Pelvic, Spine, Thoracic & Spine, Extracranial] RT; Elements AI Tumor Segmentation RT; Elements SmartBrush [Angio, Spine] RT; Elements Object Management RT
intended_use: The device is intended for radiation treatment planning for use in stereotactic, conformal, computer planned, Linac based radiation treatment and indicated for cranial, head and neck and extracranial
intended_use_full: The device is intended for radiation treatment planning for use in stereotactic, conformal, computer planned, Linac based radiation treatment and indicated for cranial, head and neck and extracranial lesions.
target_condition: Cranial lesions (brain metastases, meningiomas, gliomas, nerve tumors), head and neck lesions, and extracranial lesions suitable for stereotactic radiation therapy
ground_truth: Manual ground-truth segmentations (annotations) created by external independent annotator team including US and non-US radiologists following a well-defined data curation process
other_metrics: For Elements AI Tumor Segmentation: Mean Dice coefficient 0.75 [95% CI: 0.74–0.76]; Mean Precision 0.86 [95% CI: 0.85–0.88]; Mean Recall 0.85 [95% CI: 0.83–0.87]. By tumor type - Metastases to CNS: Dice 0.74, Precision 0.85, Recall 0.84; Meningiomas: Dice 0.76, Precision 0.89, Recall 0.90; Cranial/paraspinal nerve tumors: Dice 0.89, Precision 0.97, Recall 0.97; Gliomas/glio-neuronal tumors: Dice 0.81, Precision 0.95, Recall 0.85. Dose calculation performance: Pencil Beam/Monte Carlo better than 3%; Circular Cone 1%/1mm.
